testcase.name: test_search_with_limit

failure.message: AssertionError: Should return at most 5 cards, got 20 assert 20 <= 5 + where 20 = len([{'beta': 0.54, 'cardsight_id': '74625274-4957-4948-994a-32e9cef9fd03', 'category': 'Hockey', 'championships': 0, ...}, {'beta': 1.65, 'cardsight_id': '57c61469-b1f2-4551-a43d-5f8f0ed1954a', 'category': 'Baseball', 'championships': 0, ...}, {'beta': 0.65, 'cardsight_id': 'fb418cdc-4d84-4c4f-819c-d3aa11770541', 'category': 'Hockey', 'championships': 0, ...}, {'beta': 1.0, 'cardsight_id': '99af405e-7e1c-4db9-bf42-959bccbdac3e', 'category': 'Basketball', 'championships': 0, ...}, {'beta': 1.73, 'cardsight_id': 'c36efac1-17ef-4cae-9e4f-1093ab1f829a', 'category': 'Basketball', 'championships': 0, ...}, {'beta': 1.57, 'cardsight_id': '986d9fd3-c414-4605-ac7a-eb3a5e5b261c', 'category': 'Basketball', 'championships': 0, ...}, ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_cardsight_integration.py:125: in test_search_with_limit assert len(data["cards"]) <= 5, f"Should return at most 5 cards, got {len(data['cards'])}" E AssertionError: Should return at most 5 cards, got 20 E assert 20 <= 5 E + where 20 = len([{'beta': 0.54, 'cardsight_id': '74625274-4957-4948-994a-32e9cef9fd03', 'category': 'Hockey', 'championships': 0, ...}, {'beta': 1.65, 'cardsight_id': '57c61469-b1f2-4551-a43d-5f8f0ed1954a', 'category': 'Baseball', 'championships': 0, ...}, {'beta': 0.65, 'cardsight_id': 'fb418cdc-4d84-4c4f-819c-d3aa11770541', 'category': 'Hockey', 'championships': 0, ...}, {'beta': 1.0, 'cardsight_id': '99af405e-7e1c-4db9-bf42-959bccbdac3e', 'category': 'Basketball', 'championships': 0, ...}, {'beta': 1.73, 'cardsight_id': 'c36efac1-17ef-4cae-9e4f-1093ab1f829a', 'category': 'Basketball', 'championships': 0, ...}, {'beta': 1.57, 'cardsight_id': '986d9fd3-c414-4605-ac7a-eb3a5e5b261c', 'category': 'Basketball', 'championships': 0, ...}, ...])
